results.title: QIAGEN and NVIDIA Join Forces to Advance AI-Driven Drug Discovery
results.description: QIAGEN’s Digital Insights bioinformatics division is set to integrate NVIDIA’s accelerated computing infrastructure and the BioNeMo platform to strengthen AI-driven drug discovery capabilities for pharmaceutical and biotechnology researchers. The collaboration aims to make AI more actionable in research settings by combining advanced bioinformatics tools with curated biomedical knowledge bases. The partnership is designed to help [...] The post QIAGEN and NVIDIA Join Forces to Advance AI-Driven Drug Discovery first appeared on World Pharma Today .

results.title: GitHub Hack: Internal Repositories Compromised via Employee Device
results.description: GitHub, the popular developer platform owned by Microsoft, has confirmed unauthorised access to its internal repositories who stole data from around 3,800 of them. The code hosting and sharing company detected a compromised employee device infected through a malicious video studio code extension. In a series of posts on X, the company said it had [...] The post GitHub Hack: Internal Repositories Compromised via Employee Device appeared first on CXOToday.com .

results.title: IGEL and Zscaler Release Healthcare Security Blueprints for Distributed Care Delivery
results.description: New joint blueprints help healthcare organizations modernize infrastructure by extending a secure, immutable endpoint OS foundation into SASE architectures IGEL, a global software company delivering the Adaptive Secure Endpoint PlatformTM, announced the availability of new healthcare security blueprints developed in partnership with Zscaler, the leader in cloud security.
